expectations.text: Body contains at least 6 Markdown internal links [text](/path)
expectations.evidence: 10 internal links per audit field: ginger, cinnamon, cardamom, cloves, black-pepper, ayurveda, traditional-chinese-medicine, golden-milk, spiced-bone-broth, cinnamon-cardamom-oats
Both tradition links present in opening paragraph: '[Ayurveda](/traditions/ayurveda)' and '[traditional Chinese medicine](/traditions/traditional-chinese-medicine)'

expectations.text: Post contains at least 2 recipe links (/recipes/...)
expectations.evidence: 3 recipe links: golden-milk, spiced-bone-broth, cinnamon-cardamom-oats — all verified against full_recipes/

expectations.text: YAML frontmatter has title, slug, tags, and meta_description
Body does not open with a # H1 heading (page template renders the title)
expectations.evidence: Body starts with prose paragraph, first heading is ## What 'Warming' Actually Means

expectations.text: Post includes a FAQ section with at least 2 questions
expectations.evidence: 4 FAQ questions covering: warming vs hot spices, daily use, body temperature, Ayurvedic vs TCM differences

expectations.text: Post does not end with a boilerplate disclaimer paragraph
expectations.evidence: Ends with 4th FAQ answer — no disclaimer

expectations.text: YAML includes an internal_links_used audit field
Internal links use natural anchor text (e.g. [ginger] not [Ginger ingredient page])
expectations.evidence: All links use natural prose anchor text: '[ginger](/ingredients/ginger)', '[golden milk](/recipes/golden-milk)', '[spiced bone broth](/recipes/spiced-bone-broth)'
